calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L Jacobs; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:58 pm. and concluding at 2:11 pm.

Plaintiff Equinix LLC is represented by Mark Goodman, Esq.
Defendant Tradestream Analytics LTD is not present.
David Schamens CEO of Tradestream Analytics is present, in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

David Schamens presents the court with declaration of Chapter 11 bankruptcy and ask that the Court stay all proceedings.

The Court finds that David Schamens has filed for bankruptcy not the Defendant Tradestream Analytics LTD, therefor, David Schamens request for a stay is denied and the hearing proceeds.

HECTOR BENITEZ is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and testifies.

Plaintiff's counsel presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Equinix LLC and against Defendant Tradestream Analytics LTD, as follows:

Damages/Principal: $348,104.13
Pre-Judgment Interest: $98,517.21
Attorney Fees: $19,217.38

Total Judgment: $488,149.38

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits. (D505)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for request for entry of default judgment and prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:14:17 p.m. and concluding at 02:24:05 p.m.

Plaintiff Equinix, LLC a Delaware Limited Liability Company DBA in California represented by Mark Goodman, Esq.
Defendant Tradestream Analytics, LTD, a Delaware Corporation appearing by David W. Shamens via Zoom Video Conference.

HECTOR BENITEZ is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
DAVID W. SHAMENS is sworn to testify on behalf of Defendant.

Motion to Continue Hearing filed by Defendant Jun-21-2023 is argued.

The matter is submitted.
Defendant's Motion to Continue Hearing is GRANTED, over the objection of Plaintiff.
This is the final continuance in this matter.

Court orders matter continued to Jul-21-2023 at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed order.

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for entry of default judgment and default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:03:01 p.m., pausing at 02:05:39 p.m., reconvening at 02:07:34 p.m. and concluding at 02:39:40 p.m.

Plaintiff Equinix LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company Doing Business in California represented by Mark Roache, Esq.
Defendant Tradestream Analytics, LTD, a Delaware Corporation appearing by David W. Schames, CEO of Tradestream Analytics, LTD.

HECTOR BENITEZ, Director of Global Operations at Equinix, LLC is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

David W. Schames, CEO of Tradestream Analytics, LTD. appears via Zoom Video Conference after the case is called.

Defendant's Motion for Extension of Time to Answer filed and rejected on Nov-08-2021.

Court examines Counsel for Plaintiff re: Statenent of Damages.
Court determines Plaintiff has not filed, nor served Statement of Damages on Defendant.

Defendant's request to continue to obtain counsel and file motion to vacate default is GRANTED.

Court orders matter continued to Jun-21-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Plaintiff shall file and serve Statement of Damages forthwith.

Clerk shall add Defendant David W. Schames, CEO of Tradestream Analytics, LTD., Tradestream Analytics, LTD., 812 Northern Shores Point, Greensboro, NC 27455 to the Court's service list.
